+    n = len(per_episode)

+    if n == 0: n = 1

+    explored_rate = total_explored / n

+    success_rate = success_count / n

+    travel_distance = total_dist / success_count if success_count > 0 else 0.0

+    exploration_score = 0.0

+    for ep in per_episode:

+        if ep["success"] and ep["travel_distance"] > 0:

+            exploration_score += (300.0 / ep["travel_distance"])

+    exploration_score /= n

+    per_type_summary = {}

+    for t in ["room", "tunnel", "outdoor"]:

+        stats = per_type.get(t, {"explored":[], "success":[], "distance":[]})

+        ns = len(stats["success"]) or 1

+        sr = sum(stats["success"]) / ns

+        er = sum(stats["explored"]) / ns

+        td = sum(stats["distance"]) / sum(stats["success"]) if sum(stats["success"]) > 0 else 0.0

+        per_type_summary[t] = {"explored_rate": float(er), "travel_distance": float(td), "success_rate": float(sr)}

+    result = {

+        "explored_rate": float(explored_rate),

+        "travel_distance": float(travel_distance),

+        "success_rate": float(success_rate),

+        "per_episode": per_episode,

+        "per_type": per_type_summary,
